title: Pillar Security Platform
description:
Pillar provides holistic AI security through discovery and mapping of models, prompts, tools, 
agents, datasets, MCP servers, and third-party components, enabling effective and customized 
AI-SPM, Red Teaming, and Runtime Protection for agentic systems.

items: Apply differential privacy or obfuscation on sensitive data injected into agent memory.
Agent Action Audit, Apply PII & Sensitive data masking injected into agent components
